annotations.analysis: Winning SP8192 base smoke test on 1xH100: train_loss=2.54@step200 in 300s. Architecture: 11L 512d, depth recurrence (layers 3-5 loop 2x, activated at 35%), parallel residuals (layer 7+), skip gates, QK-Gain=5.0, MLP 4x, MuonEq-R, WD=0.095, LeakyReLU^2, partial RoPE 16/64. Flash attention fallback to PyTorch SDPA works. VOCAB_SIZE=1024 for smoke (SP8192 data not on golden image).

Infrastructure fix: evo_benchmark.py had extra_files kwarg not supported by run_smoke/run_qualify. Fixed by copying target to repo root instead. All 4 child experiments (exp_0001-0004) failed with score=99.0 due to this bug.

QK_GAIN_INIT=5.25 confirmed improvement: score 2.538 vs baseline 2.5399 (-0.0019). Sharper attention initialization from competition leader default yields consistent improvement. Ready to try ENABLE_LOOPING_AT=0.25 (earlier depth recurrence) on top of this.

ENABLE_LOOPING_AT=0.25 regresses: 2.5444 vs parent exp_0014's 2.538. Earlier looping (25% vs 35%) hurts at smoke-test scale. The depth recurrence benefits from starting later in training when representations are more mature. ENABLE_LOOPING_AT=0.35 is better.
